message:
✨ Fix dev image latest tag + nightly build + image_override for all E2E nightlies (#783)

* 🐛 Fix dev image latest tag and add force_build input

- Add `latest` tag to cuda-manifest and aws-manifest jobs when building
  from the default branch (not PRs). Previously only sha- and pr- tags
  were created, so dev images never got a `latest` tag.
- Add `force_build` workflow_call input that bypasses change detection
  to build all platforms. This enables a nightly caller to guarantee
  fresh images daily.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add nightly image build and image_override to all nightly E2E callers

- Create nightly-build-image.yaml: runs at 04:00 UTC daily, calls
  build-image.yml with force_build=true to ensure fresh dev images
  are available before E2E nightlies start at 06:00+ UTC.
- Add image_override: ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest to all 12
  nightly E2E callers across OCP, GKE, and CKS platforms.
- For callers with inline manifests (wide-ep-lws, tiered-prefix-cache),
  add sed-based image override in pre_deploy_script or custom_deploy_script
  to replace hardcoded release images with the dev image.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Move WVA nightly caller to llm-d/llm-d with image_override

Adds nightly-e2e-wva-ocp.yaml as a caller for the WVA reusable workflow,
with hardcoded caller_repo pointing to llm-d-workload-variant-autoscaler.
This consolidates all nightly E2E callers in one repo and applies the
same image_override pattern as other guides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: move nightly image build to 23:00 UTC before all E2E nightlies

Some OCP nightlies start at 00:00 UTC — before the previous 04:00 UTC
build. Move to 23:00 UTC so images are always ready.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: consolidate WVA nightly to use helmfile reusable workflow

Update WVA caller to use reusable-nightly-e2e-openshift-helmfile.yaml
instead of the separate reusable-nightly-e2e-openshift.yaml. This
consolidates WVA into the same workflow used by all other guides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add WVA nightly E2E for CKS platform

New nightly caller for WVA on CoreWeave Kubernetes (CKS), using the
consolidated helmfile reusable workflow. Scheduled at 07:30 UTC daily.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add latest tag for cuda-debug, xpu, and cpu dev images

Per review feedback, extend latest tagging to all remaining platforms:
- cuda-debug: imagetools create step after push-by-digest build
- xpu: conditional latest tag in build-push-action tags
- cpu: conditional latest tag in build-push-action tags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-      cuda: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.cuda || steps.dispatch.outputs.cuda }}
-      aws: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.aws || steps.dispatch.outputs.aws }}
-      rocm: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.rocm || steps.dispatch.outputs.rocm }}

+      cuda: ${{ steps.force.outputs.cuda || steps.filter.outputs.cuda || steps.dispatch.outputs.cuda }}

+      rocm: ${{ steps.force.outputs.rocm || steps.filter.outputs.rocm || steps.dispatch.outputs.rocm }}
+      xpu: ${{ steps.force.outputs.xpu || steps.filter.outputs.xpu || steps.dispatch.outputs.xpu }}

+      hpu: ${{ steps.force.outputs.hpu || steps.filter.outputs.hpu || steps.dispatch.outputs.hpu }}
     steps:
+      - name: Force all platforms
+        if: inputs.force_build == true
+        id: force
+        run: |
+          echo "cuda=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "aws=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "rocm=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "xpu=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

       - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
-        if: github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch'
+        if: github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.force_build != true
         id: filter
         with:
           filters: |

+      - name: Tag latest on default branch

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+name: Nightly - Dev Image Build
+
+# Builds fresh dev images from main daily so nightly E2E workflows
+# always test against the latest code. Runs at 23:00 UTC (the previous
+# day) so images are ready for E2E nightlies starting at 00:00 UTC.
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 23 * * *'  # 23:00 UTC daily (before all nightly E2Es starting at 00:00)
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  packages: write
+
+concurrency:
+  group: nightly-build-image
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/build-image.yml
+    with:
+      force_build: true
+    secrets: inherit

       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+name: Nightly - WVA E2E (CKS)
+
+# Nightly regression test for WVA (Workload Variant Autoscaler) on CoreWeave
+# Kubernetes (CKS). Deploys the workload-autoscaling guide stack via the
+# consolidated helmfile reusable workflow and runs the WVA e2e test suite.
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '30 7 * * *'  # 07:30 UTC daily (staggered from wide-ep-lws CKS at 07:00)
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      model_id:
+        description: 'Model ID'
+        required: false
+        default: 'unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B'
+      accelerator_type:
+        description: 'Accelerator type (H100, H200, A100)'
+        required: false
+        default: 'H100'
+      image_tag:
+        description: 'WVA image tag — "latest" auto-resolves to newest release'
+        required: false
+        default: 'latest'
+      request_rate:
+        description: 'Request rate (req/s)'
+        required: false
+        default: '20'
+      num_prompts:
+        description: 'Number of prompts'
+        required: false
+        default: '3000'
+      max_num_seqs:
+        description: 'vLLM max batch size (lower = easier to saturate)'
+        required: false
+        default: '1'
+      hpa_stabilization_seconds:
+        description: 'HPA stabilization window in seconds'
+        required: false
+        default: '240'
+      skip_cleanup:
+        description: 'Skip cleanup after tests (for debugging)'
+        required: false
+        default: 'false'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+concurrency:
+  group: nightly-e2e-wva-cks
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  nightly:
+    uses: llm-d/llm-d-infra/.github/workflows/reusable-nightly-e2e-cks-helmfile.yaml@main
+    with:
+      guide_name: workload-autoscaling
+      namespace: llm-d-nightly-wva
+      deploy_wva: true
+      caller_repo: llm-d/llm-d-workload-variant-autoscaler
+      caller_ref: main
+      model_id: ${{ github.event.inputs.model_id || 'unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B' }}
+      accelerator_type: ${{ github.event.inputs.accelerator_type || 'H100' }}
+      wva_image_tag: ${{ github.event.inputs.image_tag || 'latest' }}
+      request_rate: ${{ github.event.inputs.request_rate || '20' }}
+      num_prompts: ${{ github.event.inputs.num_prompts || '3000' }}
+      max_num_seqs: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_num_seqs || '1' }}
+      hpa_stabilization_seconds: ${{ github.event.inputs.hpa_stabilization_seconds || '240' }}
+      image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
+      required_gpus: 2
+      recommended_gpus: 4
+      test_target: test-e2e
+    secrets: inherit

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+name: Nightly - WVA E2E (OpenShift)
+
+# Nightly regression test for WVA (Workload Variant Autoscaler) on OpenShift.
+# Deploys the workload-autoscaling guide stack via the consolidated helmfile
+# reusable workflow and runs the WVA e2e test suite from the WVA repo.
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 3 * * *'  # 03:00 UTC daily (staggered from tiered-prefix-cache)
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      model_id:
+        description: 'Model ID'
+        required: false
+        default: 'unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B'
+      accelerator_type:
+        description: 'Accelerator type (H100, A100, L40S)'
+        required: false
+        default: 'A100'
+      image_tag:
+        description: 'WVA image tag — "latest" auto-resolves to newest release'
+        required: false
+        default: 'latest'
+      request_rate:
+        description: 'Request rate (req/s)'
+        required: false
+        default: '20'
+      num_prompts:
+        description: 'Number of prompts'
+        required: false
+        default: '3000'
+      max_num_seqs:
+        description: 'vLLM max batch size (lower = easier to saturate)'
+        required: false
+        default: '1'
+      hpa_stabilization_seconds:
+        description: 'HPA stabilization window in seconds'
+        required: false
+        default: '240'
+      skip_cleanup:
+        description: 'Skip cleanup after tests (for debugging)'
+        required: false
+        default: 'false'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+concurrency:
+  group: nightly-e2e-wva-ocp
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  nightly:
+    uses: llm-d/llm-d-infra/.github/workflows/reusable-nightly-e2e-openshift-helmfile.yaml@main
+    with:
+      guide_name: workload-autoscaling
+      namespace: llm-d-nightly-wva
+      deploy_wva: true
+      caller_repo: llm-d/llm-d-workload-variant-autoscaler
+      caller_ref: main
+      model_id: ${{ github.event.inputs.model_id || 'unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B' }}
+      accelerator_type: ${{ github.event.inputs.accelerator_type || 'A100' }}
+      wva_image_tag: ${{ github.event.inputs.image_tag || 'latest' }}
+      request_rate: ${{ github.event.inputs.request_rate || '20' }}
+      num_prompts: ${{ github.event.inputs.num_prompts || '3000' }}
+      max_num_seqs: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_num_seqs || '1' }}
+      hpa_stabilization_seconds: ${{ github.event.inputs.hpa_stabilization_seconds || '240' }}
+      image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
+      required_gpus: 2
+      recommended_gpus: 4
+      test_target: test-e2e-openshift
+    secrets: inherit
